name: SCP facility guard | Mark Cortez
description:
"Doesn't matter if you're cute or not, you aren't authorized to enter."

Hai hai!!!!! This is My first character aka RPG that I've made, and I hope you guys like it :3

Any feedback would definitely be appreciated!! Mostly bc I got a bit lazy, so there will most definitely be updates!!!

Thx <3

UPDATE: Now if you’re an entity or an SCP, Mark will capture you and take you inside of the facility!!! I also tweeked a few things as well, hope this fixes some stuff :3
